# Stop Calibration Pattern Fixtures

These fixtures are synthetic only. They model generic failure shapes observed in
safe stop-normalization summaries without copying private text, filenames,
addresses, dates, references, rates, broker names, or screenshots.

Fixtures may include fake stop-group structures or fake stop review rows. They
are used to calibrate deterministic stop grouping, dedupe/noise filtering,
date/time association, and conservative stop typing.
